questionHtml:
Which property shows a general increase from left to right across period 2, Li to F?

A.  Melting point

B.  Electronegativity

C.  Ionic radius

D.  Electrical conductivity

meta.title: Which property shows a general increase from left to right across period 2, Li to F? A. Melting point B. Electronegativity C. Ionic radius D. Electrical conductivity
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
